title: T-003 — Implement GET /api/v1/onboarding/resume endpoint

pipeline_inputs.description: API endpoint to retrieve current onboarding state for resume
pipeline_inputs.details: Create GET /api/v1/onboarding/resume endpoint (FastAPI). Queries organizations table for current auth context org; returns onboarding_state JSON plus a status field. Status logic: if current_step > 5 and completed_steps includes [1,2,3] and (4 in completed OR 4 in skipped) and (5 in completed OR 5 in skipped), return status='complete'; if current_step == 1 and last_activity_at is null, return status='not_started'; otherwise return status='in_progress'. Response includes full state object (current_step, completed_steps, skipped_steps, started_at, last_activity_at) and status key.
acceptance_criteria: Given org at step 3 with completed_steps=[1,2], when GET /api/v1/onboarding/resume, then return status='in_progress' and current_step=3
Given org with current_step=7 and all mandatory steps completed, when GET /api/v1/onboarding/resume, then return status='complete'
Given new org never touched wizard, when GET /api/v1/onboarding/resume, then return status='not_started' and current_step=1
test_strategy: Write RED test: test_resume_in_progress() sets up org at step 3 and verifies resume response
Write RED test: test_resume_complete() sets up org with all steps done
risk_red_lines: Do not expose sensitive data (timestamps must be ISO strings, no internal IDs)
Do not modify onboarding_state when reading (GET is read-only)
